nasb.text: King Solomon offered a sacrifice of 22,000 oxen and 120,000 sheep. Thus the king and all the people dedicated the house of God.

esv.text: King Solomon offered as a sacrifice 22,000 oxen and 120,000 sheep. So the king and all the people dedicated the house of God.

cnv.text: 所羅門王獻上了二萬二千頭牛、十二萬隻羊為祭。這樣，王和全體人民為　神的殿舉行了奉獻禮。

ccb.text: 所罗门王献上两万二千头牛和十二万只羊，王和全体民众为上帝的殿举行奉献典礼。
